vulnerabilities.title: srvx is vulnerable to middleware bypass via absolute URI in request line
vulnerabilities.description:
## Summary

A pathname parsing discrepancy in srvx's `FastURL` allows middleware bypass on the Node.js adapter when a raw HTTP request uses an absolute URI with a non-standard scheme (e.g. `file://`).

## Details

When Node.js receives an absolute URI in the request line (e.g. `GET file://hehe?/internal/run HTTP/1.1`), `req.url` is set verbatim to `file://hehe?/internal/run`. Since this doesn't start with `/`, `NodeRequestURL` passes it directly to `FastURL` as a string, which stores it in `#hre
